title: Better Item Frames
description: This datapack adds more features to item frames.
body:
This datapack combines multiple of my datapacks that modify item frames, each of these features can be toggled using the in-game config menu.

## Features
- Rotate the item in the frame in the other direction by holding shift while clicking it.
- Throwing a splash potion of invisibility will make the item frame invisible. Throw a splash water bottle to make it visible again.
 
## Config
Run `/function item_frame:config` to open the configuration menu

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
